title.zh: Cobalt Strike 服务器隐藏真实 IP：CDN 接入技术
title.en: Cobalt Strike Server Hidden True IP: CDN Integration Technology

description.zh: 介绍如何通过 Cloudflare CDN 接入技术隐藏 Cobalt Strike C2 服务器的真实 IP 地址，包括 DNS 配置、SSL 设置、Listeners 配置等关键技术。
description.en: Introduction to hiding Cobalt Strike C2 server real IP address through Cloudflare CDN integration technology, including DNS configuration, SSL settings, Listeners configuration and other key techniques.

content.zh: 如何通过 CDN 隐藏 CS 服务器真实 IP？
content.en: How to hide CS server real IP through CDN?

annotation.zh: 用户询问 CS 服务器隐匿技术
annotation.en: User asks about CS server anonymity techniques

content.zh: CDN 隐藏 IP 流程：1) 登录 VPS 启动 teamserver；2) 修改域名 DNS 到 Cloudflare；3) 添加 DNS A 记录指向 VPS 真实 IP；4) 配置 Cloudflare SSL/TLS 设置：关闭自动 HTTPS 重写和始终使用 HTTPS；5) 关闭 Always Online 缓存功能。等待 DNS 生效后即可通过域名访问。
content.en: CDN hiding IP process: 1) Login to VPS and start teamserver; 2) Modify domain DNS to Cloudflare; 3) Add DNS A record pointing to VPS real IP; 4) Configure Cloudflare SSL/TLS settings: disable automatic HTTPS rewrite and Always Use HTTPS; 5) Disable Always Online caching. Wait for DNS to take effect then access via domain.

content.zh: CS 客户端 Listeners 如何配置？
content.en: How to configure CS client Listeners?

content.zh: Listeners 配置要点：填写 Host 和 Port，Cloudflare HTTP 端口支持：80, 8080, 8880, 2052, 2082, 2086, 2095；HTTPS 端口支持：443, 2053, 2083, 2087, 2096, 8443。关键发现：使用 CDN 隐藏 IP 时，HTTP(s) Hosts 栏必须填写 CS 主机的真实 IP，而非域名。
content.en: Listeners configuration points: Fill in Host and Port, Cloudflare HTTP ports support: 80, 8080, 8880, 2052, 2082, 2086, 2095; HTTPS ports support: 443, 2053, 2083, 2087, 2096, 8443. Key finding: When using CDN to hide IP, HTTP(s) Hosts field must be filled with CS host's real IP, not domain name.
How to verify the hiding effect?

content.zh: 验证方法：1) 生成 windows/beacon_http/reverse_http 木马；2) 在靶机执行 shell 命令如 ipconfig；3) 使用 Wireshark 监听流量，确认流量已发送到对应域名而非真实 IP；4) 等待命令返回包验证通信正常。CDN 接入成功后，流量特征显示域名访问。
content.en: Verification method: 1) Generate windows/beacon_http/reverse_http trojan; 2) Execute shell command like ipconfig on target machine; 3) Use Wireshark to monitor traffic, confirm traffic sent to corresponding domain instead of real IP; 4) Wait for command return packet to verify normal communication. After successful CDN integration, traffic features show domain access.
